description: Non-interactive end-to-end journey runs (Anatomy A13). Each journey is a pytest-driven HTTP/SQL flow that emits e2e_journey_start/step/end events into Wing's events table. This dashboard renders pass/fail trend, step durations, and per-run drill-down from wing.db via frser-sqlite-datasource. Source: tests/e2e/journeys/test_*.py.

options.content: Each row in the panels below represents one **journey run** — a `pytest tests/e2e/journeys/test_*.py` invocation that walks a real user-flow (operator login, conductor self-test, approval click, halt-resume, plugin contract check). Steps emit `e2e_journey_step` events; the journey wraps with `e2e_journey_start` + `e2e_journey_end`. Failures are visible by step. Drill into a specific run by clicking its `actor_action_id` in the *Recent runs* table and pasting it into Wing `/audit?actor_action_id=…` — every step row is queryable by that UUID.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS runs FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS runs FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND json_extract(result_json,'$.status')='failed' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND json_extract(result_json,'$.status')='failed' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(AVG(CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms_total') AS INTEGER)) AS INTEGER) AS avg_ms FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day')
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(AVG(CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms_total') AS INTEGER)) AS INTEGER) AS avg_ms FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT json_extract(result_json,'$.journey') AS journey, json_extract(result_json,'$.status') AS status, COUNT(*) AS runs, CAST(AVG(CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms_total') AS INTEGER)) AS INTEGER) AS avg_ms FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day') GROUP BY journey, status ORDER BY journey, status
targets.queryText: SELECT json_extract(result_json,'$.journey') AS journey, json_extract(result_json,'$.status') AS status, COUNT(*) AS runs, CAST(AVG(CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms_total') AS INTEGER)) AS INTEGER) AS avg_ms FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' AND ts >= datetime('now','-1 day') GROUP BY journey, status ORDER BY journey, status

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ts, json_extract(result_json,'$.journey') AS journey, json_extract(result_json,'$.status') AS status, json_extract(result_json,'$.passed') AS passed, json_extract(result_json,'$.failed') AS failed, CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms_total') AS INTEGER) AS duration_ms, actor_action_id FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT ts, json_extract(result_json,'$.journey') AS journey, json_extract(result_json,'$.status') AS status, json_extract(result_json,'$.passed') AS passed, json_extract(result_json,'$.failed') AS failed, CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms_total') AS INTEGER) AS duration_ms, actor_action_id FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_end' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ts, json_extract(result_json,'$.journey') AS journey, json_extract(result_json,'$.step') AS step, json_extract(result_json,'$.status') AS status, CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms') AS INTEGER) AS duration_ms, json_extract(result_json,'$.note') AS note, json_extract(result_json,'$.error') AS error FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_step' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT ts, json_extract(result_json,'$.journey') AS journey, json_extract(result_json,'$.step') AS step, json_extract(result_json,'$.status') AS status, CAST(json_extract(result_json,'$.duration_ms') AS INTEGER) AS duration_ms, json_extract(result_json,'$.note') AS note, json_extract(result_json,'$.error') AS error FROM events WHERE type='e2e_journey_step' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

title: E2E Journeys
